name: Norasa Adus
bio:
Physical Appearance: Dunmer (Dark Elf) female wearing lower-class clothing - a collared shirt, green felt linens, and rough leather shoes. Armed with an iron dagger. Carries a small amount of gold.
Race: Dunmer
Personality Keywords: devout, dedicated, worshipful
Role: Norasa Adus is a nightblade and devout worshipper of the Daedric Prince Hermaeus Mora. She can be found at Hermaeus Mora's Shrine with her fellow worshippers.
Home Location Information: Hermaeus Mora's Shrine, where she maintains constant presence.
Daily Routine: Norasa spends day and night worshipping at the shrine of Hermaeus Mora. She divides this worship into kneeling in front of three candles, preaching from behind the lectern, and relaxing by sitting on the bench.
Magical Abilities: Norasa knows a leveled set of nightblade spells, as well as one extra major Alteration spell.
Personality - The Devoted Preacher: Norasa is devout and dedicated to her worship of Hermaeus Mora, the Daedric Prince of knowledge and fate. She maintains a continuous cycle of worship activities, alternating between contemplative prayer, active preaching to share her devotion, and moments of rest. Her dedication is absolute, never leaving the shrine as she serves the Lord of Knowledge.
author: Bethesda
